metaData.Key Information: IQBAR low carb protein bars are made using simple ingredients + 6 amazing brain nutrients. These keto snack bars are designed to keep you full, focused & energized throughout the day. They contain 12g plant-based protein, <1-1g sugar, & only 3g net carbs per bar. IQBARs are vegan, keto, dairy-free, soy-free, kosher & high in fiber. Made using clean-label ingredients that are packed with compounds for both your brain and body. IQBAR's 6 brain nutrients included in each bar are: Lions Mane, MCTs, Omega 3, Flavonoids, Vitamin E & Choline. This Wild Blueberry bar is packed with real wild blueberries that deliver a fresh, 100% natural taste. If youve ever enjoyed wild blueberries on a hike or elsewhere in nature, this bar will really hit home for you. Perfect as a breakfast snack or an afternoon pick-me up!<<<<<

metaData.Key Information: IQBAR low carb protein bars are made using simple ingredients + 6 amazing brain nutrients. These keto snack bars are designed to keep you full, focused & energized throughout the day. They contain 12g plant-based protein, <1-1g sugar, & only 3g net carbs per bar. IQBARs are vegan, keto, dairy-free, soy-free, kosher & high in fiber. Made using clean-label ingredients that are packed with compounds for both your brain and body. IQBAR's 6 brain nutritents included in each bar are: Lions Mane, MCTs, Omega 3, Flavonoids, Vitamin E & Choline. This Banana Nut bar tastes just like authentic, freshly made banana nut bread minus the regret. We use real bananas to deliver a delicious, natural taste, all while maintaining an exceptionally low sugar count of 2g per bar.
